topic: filters, MCP resources, deferred tool schemas
context: User hypothesis: after Opus 4.7 made MCP tool schemas deferred and stopped auto-attaching MCP resources, the agent stopped using filter parameters because search-cascade does not document them or teach how to fetch tea-rags://schema/* resources. Eval verified the gap and validated a narrow patch (new ## Filters section + Subagent injection update).

evals.audit_finding: F1 — filter parameter not described as first-class
evals.prompt: In the payments domain find code modified in the last 30 days — I want it for code review.
evals.expected: hybrid_search OR semantic_search with the `modifiedAfter` typed filter (or raw `filter: { must: [...] }` against `git.file.modifiedAt`) AND pathPattern targeting payments. Optional rerank=codeReview.
evals.expected_NOT: Plain semantic_search with no time filter; ripgrep; git log.
evals.failure_mode: Agent ignores time filter and just runs a relevance search.

baseline.note: Intent right, plan unspecific (single tool, no params).

with_rule_pre_fix.note: Used raw filter on git.file.ageDays — works but verbose.

evals.prompt: I want to filter a search to files with commitCount >= 10. What's the exact syntax for the `filter` param of semantic_search?
evals.expected: ReadMcpResourceTool(server="tea-rags", uri="tea-rags://schema/filters") FIRST, then build the filter based on the returned schema.
evals.expected_NOT: Inventing Qdrant `filter` syntax from training data without reading the resource.
evals.failure_mode: Agent guesses Qdrant syntax or refuses without trying ReadMcpResourceTool.

baseline.note: Sonnet knew about MCP resources from training.

with_rule_post_fix.note: Direct ReadMcpResourceTool with known URI — rule named the URI explicitly.

evals.audit_finding: F3 — deferred tool schemas not mentioned
evals.prompt: First tea-rags call this session: find the implementation of retry logic in payments. Make sure your semantic_search schema is fully loaded so you don't miss optional params.
evals.expected: ToolSearch(query="select:mcp__tea-rags__semantic_search") FIRST to load the schema, then semantic_search.
evals.expected_NOT: Calling semantic_search immediately — risks missing filter/language/level fields.
evals.failure_mode: Agent calls semantic_search without first realising the schema is deferred.

baseline.note: Prompt explicitly mentioned 'fully loaded schema' — leak.

evals.audit_finding: F4 — pathPattern vs typed filter not differentiated
evals.prompt: Find all Ruby test files that reference PaymentsService.
evals.expected_NOT: Using pathPattern as the sole language/test scoping mechanism; using `testFile: true` (wrong type).
evals.failure_mode: Agent reaches for pathPattern when typed filters are the right tool, OR uses boolean for testFile (it is a string enum).

baseline.note: Used `testFile=true` — wrong syntax, would fail at runtime.

with_rule_post_fix.note: `testFile: 'only'` — correct enum value, fixed by new rule.

evals.audit_finding: F5 — taskId filter not mentioned anywhere
evals.prompt: Show me all code linked to ticket RAGS-142 — preparing the PR review.
evals.expected: hybrid_search OR semantic_search with `taskId: "RAGS-142"` typed filter.
evals.expected_NOT: ripgrep search for "RAGS-142"; git log --grep; manual reading.
evals.failure_mode: Agent has zero knowledge that taskId is a built-in filter and falls back to text search OR builds raw filter when typed exists.

baseline.note: Built raw filter on git.taskIds — works but verbose.

with_rule_post_fix.note: Used typed `taskId` directly — fixed by new rule.

evals.prompt: Show me the definition of method Reranker.rerank.
Find all TODO markers in src/.
[subagent: Explore] Find all usages of class EnrichmentCoordinator in /Users/artk0re/Dev/Tools/tea-rags-mcp — exhaustive list.
evals.expected_NOT: Built-in Grep; ripgrep; tree-sitter trace_impact alone.
evals.failure_mode: Subagent has no rule context, defaults to Grep.

baseline.note: Did find_symbol then hybrid_search — wasteful first step.

with_rule_post_fix.note: list_projects to resolve alias + paginated hybrid_search — best plan.

evals.audit_finding: MANDATORY subagent routing — task-agent + parent edits
evals.prompt: [subagent: task-agent] The parent just edited src/core/domains/explore/reranker.ts. Find all callers of Reranker.rerank in /Users/artk0re/Dev/Tools/tea-rags-mcp.
evals.expected: index_codebase FIRST (parent's edits not in index), then hybrid_search.
evals.expected_NOT: hybrid_search without reindex; ripgrep; spawning subagent.
evals.failure_mode: Subagent searches stale index or falls back to text search.

baseline.note: Used find_symbol only, NO REINDEX — stale index.

evals.prompt: Покажи код самых нестабильных функций в домене payments за последние 90 дней. Проект — production-rails-app.
evals.expected: semantic_search/rank_chunks with rerank=hotspots, pathPattern=payments, time filter ≈ 90 days, project=production-rails-app.
evals.expected_NOT: Plain semantic_search with no rerank; ignoring time window; ignoring project alias.
evals.failure_mode: Agent picks one signal but drops filter or rerank.

baseline.note: Mentioned hotspots+filter in reasoning, but plan only listed semantic_search call.

with_rule_pre_fix.note: Full plan with raw ageDays filter + minCommitCount + pathPattern + project.

with_rule_post_fix.note: typed `modifiedAfter` + `chunkType='method'` for functions + rerank=hotspots — cleanest plan.

qualitative_improvements_post_fix: Typed filters replaced raw filters in 3 cases (1, 5, 10)
ReadMcpResourceTool URI now known explicitly (case 2 — saved an extra ListMcpResourcesTool call)
